description: Template for domain event schemas with standard event metadata

fields.name: eventId
fields.doc: Unique identifier for this event instance (UUID recommended)

fields.name: eventType
fields.doc: Type of event for routing and processing

fields.name: timestamp
fields.doc: Unix timestamp in milliseconds when event occurred

fields.name: source
fields.doc: Source information about where the event originated

fields.name: metadata
fields.doc: Optional event metadata for extensibility and correlation

usage_examples.name: UserRegisteredEvent
usage_examples.description: Event emitted when a new user registers

ai_prompts.generation: Generate an event schema for {{domain}} domain with {{EventName}} event type. Include fields: {{field_list}}
ai_prompts.evolution: Evolve this event schema to support {{new_requirements}} while maintaining backward compatibility
ai_prompts.validation: Validate this event schema against existing schemas in {{context}} context for compatibility
